items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 15: To help / To know. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• Lesson 15
• I help I know
• I help my cousin Eu know how to speak English
• I help my uncle I know how to go downtown

items.prompt: To help – ajudar To know - saber

items.text: I help my cousin Eu know how to speak English

items.prompt: Eu ajudo meu primo Eu sei falar inglês
options: I help my cousin Eu know how to speak English 3.
I help my cousin Eu know how to speak English
You help my cousin Eu know how to speak English
English speak to how know Eu cousin my help I

items.answer: I help my uncle I know how to go downtown
I help my aunt I know how to play chess
